Privacy & Sharing
Control what your advisor can see — your data, your rules
Data Visibility Settings
Choose which sections your advisor can view. Hiding a section does not delete your data — it simply limits advisor visibility during reviews.
Your Rights
Your financial data belongs to you. You can export all your data at any time from the Overview page. Your advisor can only see sections you have enabled above. You can request full account deletion from the Overview page. All advisor access to your profile is logged and visible in the Advisor Activity section.

New Client
Controls whether this client can log into their own portal. All tiers are paid. Agents can create clients but cannot grant access.
No Access
No portal login
Grant Access
Client can log in
Create client login and send access email
Link Account
Link two client accounts as a household. Choose how they manage their finances together.
Joint: Both partners share one PFOS dataset. Changes by either person update the same profile. Best for couples who manage everything together.
Link your accounts securely
PFOS uses Plaid Inc. to securely connect your financial accounts. Before you continue, here's what that means:
  • Your bank login stays with your bank. You enter your credentials directly into Plaid's secure interface — PFOS never sees or stores your bank username or password.
  • What we receive. Balances, account & routing numbers (where required), transactions, investment holdings, loan & credit details, identity on file, and recurring patterns — for the accounts you choose.
  • How we use it. Only to power your PFOS features: balances & net worth, spending, budgeting, investments & debts, and your planning tools.
  • Read-only. PFOS cannot move money — no transfers, payments, or trades, ever.
  • You're in control. Disconnect any account anytime; we instruct Plaid to remove access and delete its data (subject to limited legal/backup retention).
By continuing, you authorize PFOS and Plaid to access your account information as described and in our Privacy Policy and Plaid's End User Privacy Policy.
Questions about your data? Contact privacy@esjfinancial.com. You can review and revoke linked-account access anytime in PFOS.
Review linked accounts
Tag who each account belongs to and choose whether to include it in your plan. Synced balances stay read-only; you can still edit plan fields later.
Linked accounts
Choose which accounts count in your plan. Unchecking an account keeps it linked but removes it from your net worth, budget, and projections.

Invite Agent
The agent will receive a setup email. They can log in, manage their own clients, and use the PFOS tool — but cannot see other agents' clients or send client portal invitations.
Terms of Service & Privacy Policy

Educational Purpose. This platform provides financial education, decision-support tools, and organizational resources. It is not a substitute for licensed financial, legal, or tax advice. Always consult a qualified professional before making significant financial decisions.

Data Use. Your financial data is stored securely and used only to provide the services described. We do not sell your data to third parties. Data may be shared with your assigned financial advisor as part of the advisory service.

No Refund Policy. All subscription fees are non-refundable. By registering you acknowledge this policy.

Accuracy. You are responsible for the accuracy of the information you enter. The platform's recommendations are based on the data you provide.

Account Termination. We reserve the right to terminate accounts that violate these terms. You may request account deletion at any time from your portal settings.

Changes. These terms may be updated periodically. Continued use of the platform constitutes acceptance of any updates.

Last updated: 2026. Contact your administrator for questions.

📋 Important Disclosure
Before accessing your financial dashboard, please read and acknowledge the following:
This platform is for educational and organizational purposes only. • The tools, scores, and recommendations provided are for informational use and do not constitute licensed financial, investment, legal, or tax advice.
• Your assigned advisor is not a licensed financial planner unless otherwise stated in writing.
• Past financial projections do not guarantee future results.
• You are responsible for your own financial decisions.

Session Expiring Soon
Your session will expire due to inactivity. Click below to stay logged in.
🗑️ Request Account Deletion
This will submit a deletion request to an administrator. Once approved, your account and all associated financial data will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.

Use biometric authentication to sign in faster on this device.
